title: oxytropis minor
intro: Oxytropis minor, also known as the buckthorn or mountain burning bush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Oxytropis minor include its potential to treat kidney stones, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support urinary health and to reduce pain and inflammation.
